daily.today_energy: Mercury's whispering something real today—trust those gut feelings hitting different. Your intuition is basically in cheat mode, so lean into the weird synchronicities you're noticing.
daily.love: Someone's been thinking about you more than you realize. Whether it's new energy or deepening something existing, today's giving vulnerable authenticity vibes. Let them see the real you.
daily.career: Your creative solutions are hitting harder than usual. Don't sleep on that idea brewing in your mind—pitch it, explore it, or just sit with it. You're tapping into something genuinely original.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness today. Less productivity obsession, more flow state energy. A walk, some water, or literally just existing without a to-do list will reset your whole vibe.

weekly.overview: Mercury's dancing through your sector of self-expression this week, Pisces. You're feeling more articulate than usual—like your inner world finally has a voice. Trust the words that want to come out. This is your moment to be seen.
weekly.love: Venus is whispering something tender into your ear. Whether you're single or coupled up, there's a vibe shift happening around intimacy and authenticity. Stop playing small in your connections. Someone's waiting for the real you to show up.
weekly.career: Your intuition is your superpower right now. That gut feeling about a project or decision? Honor it. You're picking up on details others are missing. Channel that mystical Pisces energy into your work—your unique perspective is exactly what's needed.
weekly.health: Your nervous system is asking for gentleness this week. Consider slowing down intentionally—not because you're tired, but because rest is a form of self-respect. Movement that feels like flow, not forcing. Your body knows what it needs.
